title: corchorus bifurcatus
intro: Corchorus bifurcatus, also known as the ivy gourd or kundru, is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has numerous health benefits, including aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and helping to manage blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves, roots, and seeds of Corchorus bifurcatus are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various health conditions.
